_comment: INV-11 Stage 1.5 followup (2026-05-26) — TTS Provider × Model 静态注册表. cosyvoice 复刻 voice 仍走 DB 抽 (cosyvoice-v3.5-plus-bailian-* 前缀 · 见 backend/tts/registry.py::_load_cloned_voices_from_db); fish reference / gsv emotion bank 由 GSVTTS/Fish 内部 resolve (registry 只暴露 1 占位 voice). 加新 model 见 docs/adding-new-tts-model.md.

models._comment: 本块仅作 tts_models_cache 整体加载失败时的 fallback (PM SPEC-LOCK §3 2026-06-11)。运行时 truth-of-source = DB tts_models 表。server_url 字段已删 (B.4-y2) · 走全局 ai_providers (type='tts' name='gsv' vendor_id IS NULL) 单行 · 详见 backend/tts/gsv_settings.py。
